subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! This world is even as a lifeless and feeble form, whose soul is the Word of God and whose strength lieth in His teachings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء این جهان چون هیکلی مرده و ناتوان جانش کلمه الله است و قوتش تعالیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause
